title: Helpers--Brickmasons, Blockmasons, Stonemasons, and Tile and Marble Setters
description: Help brickmasons, blockmasons, stonemasons, or tile and marble setters by performing duties requiring less skill. Duties include using, supplying, or holding materials or tools, and cleaning work area and equipment.

tasks.text: Mix mortar, plaster, and grout, manually or using machines, according to standard formulas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Erect scaffolding or other installation structures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cut materials to specified sizes for installation, using power saws or tile cutters.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Modify material moving, mixing, grouting, grinding, polishing, or cleaning procedures, according to installation or material requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Transport materials, tools, or machines to installation sites, manually or using conveyance equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide assistance in the preparation, installation, repair, or rebuilding of tile, brick, or stone surfaces.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Locate and supply materials to masons for installation, following drawings or numbered sequences.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Arrange or store materials, machines, tools, or equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean installation surfaces, equipment, tools, work sites, or storage areas, using water, chemical solutions, oxygen lances, or polishing machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Move or position materials such as marble slabs, using cranes, hoists, or dollies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove excess grout or residue from tile or brick joints, using sponges or trowels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply grout between joints of bricks or tiles, using grouting trowels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply caulk, sealants, or other agents to installed surfaces.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove damaged tile, brick, or mortar, and clean or prepare surfaces, using pliers, hammers, chisels, drills, wire brushes, or metal wire anchors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Correct surface imperfections or fill chipped, cracked, or broken bricks or tiles, using fillers, adhesives, or grouting materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
